who: sales ops manager for a marketing agency processing 10-20 closed deals/month

problem: Manual calculation of sales commissions leads to errors and delays in payouts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for sales ops managers
Indie Hackers discussions on commission workflows
DM outreach to sales ops managers with demo video
Community forums where sales ops managers share tools
try_it: Let users try simple input form for closed deals and monthly report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
